tasks.title: Project skeleton, makeBot() factory, session, env, error boundary
Postgres schema + db pool + migrations + query helpers (users, items, tags, item_tags, collections, collection_items, srs_state)
AI layer: Tagger + Summarizer interfaces, SummaryLengthError, SUMMARY_MIN/MAX_WORDS, local keyword-tagging + 100-200 word summary impls
Save flow core: forwarded-message kind detection, raw_text extraction, save pipeline (tag → summarize → store), confirmation card builder, dedupe-notice behavior
/list [n] with pagination (10 default, 50 max, OFFSET-based, paginate() helper)
/search <query> via tsvector + ILIKE on tags and raw_text, with empty-state card and Show-more callback
/tag <name> + /tags list with item counts and per-row callback navigation
/rename <old> <new> across tags and manual collections with disambiguation when both match
/delete <id> with inline confirm (✅ Yes / ❌ No) and shortcut del:<item_id> from confirmation card
/digest manual trigger with 5-item floor, snooze callback that bumps srs_state.next_show_at by 7 days
/stats dashboard: totals, top-3 tags, next-digest status, Run-digest-now callback
/cancel clears session.step and any flow-specific fields, replies Cancelled.
Weekly digest scheduler: node-cron Sun 18:00 UTC, queries srs_state, respects 5-10 bound (skip if <5, cap at 10 oldest-due, roll over the rest)
BotSpec test suite: 16 JSON specs in tests/specs/ covering all 15 commands + forwarded-message path, wired to AGNTDEV_* env harness
